translations.ideploy.method1.title: Quick Deploy
translations.ideploy.method1.description: Zero configuration. Get a live URL in under 90 seconds with automatic SSL and CDN.
translations.ideploy.method2.title: VPS Deployment
translations.ideploy.method2.description: Deploy on Idem servers or your own VPS with Docker Swarm high availability and full monitoring.
translations.ideploy.method3.title: Cloud Deploy
translations.ideploy.method3.description: AI-powered deployment on AWS, GCP, or Azure with automatic resource provisioning and cost optimization.
translations.ideploy.feature1.title: One-Click Deploy
translations.ideploy.feature1.description: Push your application live with a single click. No configuration, no DevOps expertise required.
translations.ideploy.feature2.title: Custom Domains & SSL
translations.ideploy.feature2.description: Connect your own domain with automatic SSL certificate provisioning and renewal.
translations.ideploy.feature3.title: Full Monitoring
translations.ideploy.feature3.description: Real-time logs, resource usage, uptime monitoring, and instant alerts when something goes wrong.
translations.ideploy.feature4.title: Auto Scaling
translations.ideploy.feature4.description: Automatic resource scaling based on traffic. Your app handles peak load without manual intervention.
translations.ideploy.feature5.title: Multiple Environments
translations.ideploy.feature5.description: Staging, preview, and production environments with easy promotion between stages.
translations.ideploy.feature6.title: IDEV Integration
translations.ideploy.feature6.description: Seamlessly deploy applications built with IDEV. The perfect end-to-end workflow.
translations.ideploy.seo.title: iDeploy — Sovereign Cloud & One-Click App Deployment by Idem
translations.ideploy.seo.description: The sovereign deployment service by Idem. Deploy your apps on VPS or Cloud in one click. African alternative to Western solutions with auto-scaling and integrated monitoring. Zero DevOps required.
